title: WD-40 Specialist Penetrant Spray - Professional-Grade Lubrication for Mechanics and Industrial Applications - 400ml - Rust-Busting Formula
features: Rapid Penetration: Quickly penetrates and frees stuck parts and components with ease, saving you time and effort
Rust Defense: Powered by high-grade penetrating oil and robust corrosion inhibitors, it effectively shields against rust, ensuring long-lasting durability
Tough on Rust: Eradicates rust, corrosion, and grime from metal surfaces, restoring them to their optimal condition
Versatile Utility: Perfectly suited for a wide array of applications, including automotive, marine, and industrial tasks, making it an indispensable tool
Precision Application: Equipped with a user-friendly spray can featuring a precision straw for pinpoint accuracy, making lubrication tasks precise and effortless
